title: T-003 — Drizzle migration: wo_outputs table (canonical) + output_type enum + RLS
prompt:
# T-003 — Drizzle migration: wo_outputs table (canonical) + output_type enum + RLS

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §9.4, §16.4 V-PROD-03/04/24

## Goal
08-production T-003 is the canonical owner of `wo_outputs` (2026-05-14 decision). Add Drizzle migration creating output_type_enum ('primary','co_product','by_product') and the canonical `wo_outputs` table per §9.4 with batch_number uniqueness per org per year (V-PROD-24), QA status tracking, R13 audit cols, and RLS via foundation `app.current_org_id()`.

## Cross-module relationship
Materialized from `schedule_outputs` (04-planning-basic T-005) when `wo.start` event fires. Production-only columns (batch_number, qa_status, V-PROD-24 unique-per-year, allergen cascade hooks, R13 audit) are populated at materialization time, not at planning time. Planning never inserts into `wo_outputs` — it writes to `schedule_outputs` and 08-production projects on WO start. The schedule_outputs.output_role enum carries over as wo_outputs.output_type (same set: 'primary','co_product','by_product').

## Implementation contract
packages/db/schema/production/wo-outputs.ts: pgEnum output_type_enum, table wo_outputs with PK id UUID, transaction_id UUID UNIQUE (R14), org_id (Wave0 v4.3 — never tenant_id), wo_id REFERENCES work_orders, output_type enum NOT NULL, item_id REFERENCES items, lp_id REFERENCES license_plates, qty_kg NUMERIC(12,3) CHECK >0, catch_weight_details JSONB, batch_number text NOT NULL, expiry_date DATE NOT NULL, qa_status text DEFAULT 'PENDING', label_printed_at, registered_by/at, ext_jsonb. Add UNIQUE constraint (org_id, batch_number, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM registered_at)) implementing V-PROD-24. Indexes idx_outputs_wo, idx_outputs_lp, idx_outputs_batch, idx_outputs_qa_status. RLS policy `wo_outputs_org_context` USING (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`) WITH CHECK (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`) + ENABLE + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY. Never read `current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id')` GUC.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/schema/production/wo-outputs.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production/enums.ts [modify or create]
- packages/db/schema/production/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_wo_outputs.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/wo-outputs-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given output_type_enum created, when SELECT enum_range(NULL::output_type_enum) runs, then returns ['primary','co_product','by_product']
2. Given two outputs with same batch_number in same org+year, when INSERT runs, then second fails with unique_violation (V-PROD-24)
3. Given qty_kg=0, when INSERT runs, then CHECK constraint rejects
4. Given `pg_policies` is inspected, when policies for wo_outputs are listed, then the qual/withcheck reference `app.current_org_id()` and contain no `current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id')` GUC reads.

## Test strategy
- RED: schema test asserting enum values, batch_number unique constraint, and pg_policies reference `app.current_org_id()` before schema exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test wo-outputs-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Do not change enum values (would break downstream consumers + planning schedule_outputs.output_role projection)
- Do not weaken V-PROD-24 batch uniqueness
- Do not allow qty_kg <= 0
- Do not duplicate `wo_outputs` in any planning module — 08-production T-003 is the only canonical owner (per 2026-05-14 decision; planning uses schedule_outputs in 04 T-005).

pipeline_inputs.description: Canonical wo_outputs Drizzle table (2026-05-14 decision) with output_type enum, batch_number uniqueness per org/year, QA status, RLS via app.current_org_id(). Materialized from planning's schedule_outputs (04 T-005) on WO start.
pipeline_inputs.details: Mirror §9.4 SQL: PK id UUID, transaction_id UNIQUE for R14, output_type pgEnum ('primary','co_product','by_product'), qty_kg CHECK >0, batch_number text NOT NULL with UNIQUE (org_id, batch_number, year_part_of_registered_at) enforcing V-PROD-24. Indexes: idx_outputs_wo, idx_outputs_lp, idx_outputs_batch, idx_outputs_qa_status (composite org_id+qa_status). RLS via app.current_org_id() on org_id column. RLS uses foundation `app.current_org_id()` function (Wave0 decision; see `_meta/audits/2026-05-14-tenant-context-remediation.md`). Cross-module: planning's 04 T-005 schedule_outputs is the upstream planning projection; production materializes schedule_outputs rows into wo_outputs on WO start, adding production-only fields (batch_number, qa_status, catch_weight_details, etc.).
out_of_scope: Do not implement output API endpoints
Do not implement materialization projection from schedule_outputs (that is a separate 08-production runtime task on WO start)
acceptance_criteria: Given enum applied, when enum_range(NULL::output_type_enum) runs, then ['primary','co_product','by_product'] returned
Given two outputs same org+year+batch_number, when INSERT runs, then unique_violation raised (V-PROD-24)
Given qty_kg=0 INSERT, when run, then CHECK rejects

Given pg_policies is inspected, when wo_outputs policies are listed, then the qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() and contain no current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') GUC reads
test_strategy: RED: schema test asserting enum + batch year-scoped UNIQUE + pg_policies app.current_org_id() reference before schema exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test wo-outputs-schema'
risk_red_lines: Do not read current_setting('app.tenant_id') or current_setting('app.current_org_id') directly — use the foundation app.current_org_id() function so the NULL-safe setter contract is preserved.
Do not use tenant_id as the business-scope column; per Wave0 v4.3 lock it is org_id. See _meta/audits/2026-05-14-tenant-context-remediation.md.
Do not change enum values (would break planning schedule_outputs.output_role projection)
Do not weaken V-PROD-24 batch uniqueness
Do not permit any other module to (re)create `wo_outputs` — 08-production T-003 is the sole canonical owner (planning uses schedule_outputs in 04 T-005).

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Planning-side schedule_outputs table is the upstream projection (2026-05-14 decision); 08-production T-003 owns the canonical wo_outputs and materializes schedule_outputs into wo_outputs on WO start, adding production-only columns (batch_number, qa_status, V-PROD-24, etc.).
